title: AE2 Portable Terminal Colors
description: Recolors the wireless terminals and portable cells
body:
Recolors the wireless terminals and portable cells (matching what happens when you put terminals on different-colored cables).

Needs Continuity if you want emissives.

Also supports AE2 Things and AE2 Wireless Terminal Library
